programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Scottish lassie Roo Irvine finds herself with home advantage as shes joined by David Harper on the west coast of Scotland for this leg of their road trip. After Roos head gets stuck in an antique, she decides to stick with what she knows best: old glass. Aside from buying antiques, Roo indulges her sweet tooth and learns about gelato and why this Italian dessert is so popular in Scotland. David examines a rare personal collection that tells the story of a once-booming industry.

programme.desc: An unemployed man (John Qualen) needing money is hired by an unknown employer (Lorne Greene) to commit murder.

programme.title: Spike Milligan: The Unseen Archive
programme.desc: Spotlighting the life and career of the fondly-remembered Irishman, bare witness to comedian and poet Spike Milligans never before aired film, interviews and scripts.

programme.title: Offended By Irvine Welsh

programme.title: Wills Book: Shakespeares First Folio

programme.title: Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: Martial arts romp about a TV chef who becomes embroiled in a drug lords search for an incriminating video. The kung-fu fighting cook steps in to save an investigative journalist on the run from a gang of murderous drug dealers, resulting in a potentially fatal mix-up involving her incriminating tape of the gangsters and a childrens video.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: A group of petty criminals plan to rig a major traffic jam to divert attention from their bank heist.

programme.title: Rumble in the Bronx
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop on holiday in New York puts his martial arts skills to good use when he helps out a friend whose shop is targeted by a vicious street gang. Martial arts hero Jackie Chan, as always, does all his own stunts.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but when his experiment goes wrong, he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: When Trojan prince Paris woos Helen, Queen of Sparta, away from her husband Menelaus, the legendary warrior Achilles is called to lead the armies of Greece against the city fortress of Troy.

programme.title: Twisters

programme.desc: Son of Memphis and Norma, little sweet penguin Mumble has a big problem: he cant sing a single note. In a world where everyone needs a heart song to attract a soul mate, Mumble feels he doesnt belong there. Our hero Mumble is the worst singer in the world, but he can tap dance brilliantly.

programme.title: Happy Feet Two
programme.desc: Mumbles son Erik hasnt yet found his talents, and he goes with his friends to Adelie-land which is ruled by a penguin who can fly. When Erik returns to Emperor-land and finds them trapped under big walls of ice. Will Erik be able to save his family and friends before it is too late?

He soon learns that trying to balance family, friends and romance might just be too much to handle. even for the worlds most powerful vampire.

programme.title: Flushed Away

programme.title: The LEGO Movie

However, when Sherman takes the Wabac without permission to impress his friend Penny, he accidentally rips a hole in the universe and causes havoc with world history. Its up to Mr. Peabody to mount a rescue and prevent the past, present and future from being permanently altered. A DreamWorks animation.

The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

As theyve forgotten to pay their property taxes, next-door neighbour Mr Diymeyer can buy up their home and raze it to the ground as part of his property development schemes. Can the family raise $20,000 in just one week?

programme.title: Ferris Buellers Day Off
programme.desc: A teen perpetrates a series of elaborate deceptions to ensure that he and two friends spend a carefree day in Chicago.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing hes an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: Ferris Buellers Day Off
programme.desc: A teen perpetrates a series of elaborate deceptions to ensure that he and two friends spend a carefree day in Chicago.

programme.title: Youve Got Mail

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones must figure out which of the two men in her life is the father of her child.

programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Sweeping epic about three sons raised on a Montana ranch by their father, a colonel who has turned his back on the army after the Indian Wars. Though the destinies of the boys are very different, two forces impact on each of their lives: the Great War in Europe and the love of a young woman. Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.desc: A wisecracking toddler deals with toilet training, bickering parents and a baby sister in this sequel to the 1989 hit.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Following the adventures of Yang who is a successor in to a long line of Avatars. He has to put aside his childhood in order to stop he Fire Nation from enslaving the Water, Earth and Air nations.

programme.desc: In stifling Edwardian London, Wendy Darling mesmerises her brothers every night with bedtime tales of swordplay, swashbuckling and the fearsome Captain Hook. However, the children become the heroes of an even greater story, when Peter Pan flies into their nursery one night and leads them over moonlit rooftops through a galaxy of stars and to the lush jungles of Neverland.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles and Tails reunite to battle Shadow, a mysterious new enemy with powers unlike anything theyve faced before. With their abilities outmatched in every way, they seek out an unlikely alliance to stop Shadow and protect the planet.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Grown-up Peter Pan has to return to Neverland to rediscover his true identity in order to rescue his children from the clutches of the evil Captain Hook. Peter has grown up into a workaholic executive but takes time off for a holiday in London. Once there, his children are kidnapped by Hook, and Peter must throw off his corporate image and go back to Neverland to save his children.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon

programme.desc: Unknown to humans, all-out war between cats and dogs has raged since the beginning of time. Now the cats face defeat if scientist Professor Brody can perfect a formula that will make all humans non-allergic to dogs. The cats leader, Mr Tinkles, plans to steal the serum, but first he must get past fearless dog agent Lou who, thanks to a mistake in recruitment, guards the Brody family.

programme.desc: Two years on from going their separate ways after solving their last case, the Mystery Inc crew reunite to investigate the strange goings-on at an amusement park called Spooky Island. programme.title: The Borrowers
programme.desc: Based on the Mary Norton novels about a four-inch-tall family who live beneath the floorboards of a human house. The familys future is threatened when the house falls into the hands of an evil lawyer who plans to destroy it.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: Paul Blart desperately wants to become a cop, but he is too fat to pass the physical exam. He instead works as a security guard in a shopping mall. One day criminals put the mall under siege, and Blart takes it upon himself to save the day.

The cats leader, Mr Tinkles, plans to steal the serum, but first he must get past fearless dog agent Lou who, thanks to a mistake in recruitment, guards the Brody family.

programme.desc: The Cinema List spotlights trailblazing British women directors, from `Mamma Mia! to `Promising Young Woman, celebrating female filmmaking talent.

programme.desc: Visually arresting thriller about a researcher who uses a mentally disabled gardener for ill-advised experiments in inducing mental development through virtual reality simulations. At first, the simulations seem to enhance the lawnmower mans mental powers, but then the experiment goes haywire. Based on a short story by Stephen King.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: An international hit man and quick-change artist is hired by a secret organisation to assassinate Charles de Gaulle.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: Soviet and American forces give chase when the captain of a Soviet nuclear submarine sets a course for the Maine coast.

programme.title: Three Days of the Condor
programme.desc: A bookish library clerk working for a CIA front is hunted after he stumbles across a covert intelligence operation. Returning from lunch, he finds the entire office massacred. Using his codename Condor, he contacts the CIA, but when an agent tries to kill him, he kidnaps a stranger off the street to ensure his survival and attempts to turn the tables on those who want him dead.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: An international hit man and quick-change artist is hired by a secret organisation to assassinate Charles de Gaulle.

programme.title: Batman Forever
programme.desc: DA Harvey Dent and vengeful scientist The Riddler plan to take down Batman, as Dent wrongly believes that it is Batmans fault he was disfigured, and the scientist is angry with Bruce Wayne for rejecting his experiments. The Gotham City superhero is going to need his new partner, boy wonder Robin, but will he be able to cope with the distraction of sexy doctor Chase Meridian?

programme.title: Batman and Robin
programme.desc: Batman battles super-villain Mr Freeze and seductive eco-terrorist Poison Ivy. With Freeze planning a permanent winter, faithful butler Alfred falling to a mysterious illness, and Ivy coming between the caped crusader and Robin, teaming up with Batgirl is the crime-fighting duos only chance of saving the day.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The curse of an ancient mummy protects buried treasure in the Egyptian desert. An American mercenary who knows of the secret location is rescued from a Cairo prison by an English historian and her brother, and together they set off on a hunt. Along the way, the trio encounter flesh-eating scarab beetles, killer sandstorms, and reincarnated demons.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Weather scientists Jo and Bill put marital problems aside to track a slew of devastating tornadoes raging through Oklahoma and stay one step ahead of their better-equipped but arrogant rivals. They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

programme.title: Falling Down
programme.desc: A middle-aged man reaches breaking point while gridlocked in Los Angeles traffic on a sweltering day. He abandons his car and embarks on a violent spree across town, increasing his arsenal of weapons after each confrontation. A detective who is working his last day with the LAPD before retiring begins receiving reports of the various incidents - and eventually realises that one man links them all.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Futuristic drama set in the year 2019. A ruthless TV host faces a problem: his gladiatorial show, in which convicts bid for their freedom against specially-trained assassins, is becoming too one-sided.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

Stylish historical epic retelling the fierce battle at Thermopylae in 481BC. The Spartan king, Leonidas, and his tiny army of 300 followers provided inspiration for the whole of Greece as they fought the massed ranks of the Persian army whose commander, King Xerxes, had up to a million warriors at his disposal.

programme.title: Shooter
programme.desc: Following the death of his friend, Bobby decides to leave the army but he is soon asked to come back into action in order to help prevent the assassination of the President.

programme.title: The Equalizer

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3

Stylish historical epic retelling the fierce battle at Thermopylae in 481BC. The Spartan king, Leonidas, and his tiny army of 300 followers provided inspiration for the whole of Greece as they fought the massed ranks of the Persian army whose commander, King Xerxes, had up to a million warriors at his disposal.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team race against time to find the Entity, a rogue artificial intelligence that can destroy mankind.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Former CIA assassin Jason Bourne continues his quest to fill in memory gaps. When a `Guardian reporter stumbles onto his trail, Bourne spies his chance to blow the Blackbriar black-ops brigade wide open. With some very powerful people intent on keeping their skeletons buried, he is in more danger than ever before, as his former paymasters send a series of elite killers after their reformed ex-colleague.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Epic tale in which an intrepid archaeologist tries to beat a band of Nazis to a unique religious relic which is central to their plans for world domination. Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Futuristic drama set in the year 2019. A ruthless TV host faces a problem: his gladiatorial show, in which convicts bid for their freedom against specially-trained assassins, is becoming too one-sided.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: A deep space transporter crash-lands on a desolate planet circled by three suns. Among the survivors are pilot Carolyn Fry, mystic Abu `Imam al-Walid, cop William J Johns and convicted criminal Richard B Riddick, and their first thoughts are of survival and escape. Then Fry finds out that the planet suffers a total eclipse every 22 years, which is when the hibernating, flesh-eating inhabitants awake and hunt.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Sweeping epic about three sons raised on a Montana ranch by their father, a colonel who has turned his back on the army after the Indian Wars. Though the destinies of the boys are very different, two forces impact on each of their lives: the Great War in Europe and the love of a young woman. Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: Mollys Game
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defence lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Seafaring drama based on the true story of a commercial fishing boat crew who become caught in a terrifying storm off the coast of Massachusetts. In the autumn of 1991, a fishing boat captain is determined to set sail despite the adverse weather conditions, but when the ice machine breaks down his decision to brave the storm rather than lose his catch results in a battle against 100ft waves.

programme.title: Oceans Eleven
programme.desc: Slick crime caper in which a thief, recently released from prison, rounds up a team of top criminals to rob three Las Vegas casinos owned by the man who is now dating his ex-wife.

programme.title: Get Out

programme.desc: A new bride is left under the care of friends when her husband travels to Transylvania for a meeting with Count Orlok. Plagued by horrific visions and an increasing sense of dread, she soon encounters an evil force thats far beyond her control.

programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.desc: In the centre of South Africa is an ancient landscape that was once an inland sea. Now it is a mosaic of unique habitats. Life here has evolved ingenious solutions to survive. There is nowhere in South Africa quite like the Karoo National Park.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Difficult quarantine student Taymur has a breakthrough and starts to embrace his jungle school lesson; serial truant Luthy skips class again and gives the staff a run for their money.

programme.title: Reef Wrecks
programme.desc: This island of the coast of Honduras stands out as a vacation resort hot spot. But its not just the sun and sand that brings the tourists in droves. Its actually a divers paradise with shipwrecks scattered from all corners of the the island.

programme.title: Uptown Otters
programme.desc: Welcome Annas clan back to Marina Bay, where two otter families have been trespassing. Mia catches Annas scent and hustles the Townies out of reach. The Nomads remain blissfully unaware of the coming conflict.

programme.title: Deep Dive North America
programme.desc: Marvel at North Americas natural wonders as Lizzie swims through astonishing coral reefs, excavates ancient fossils, and treks through jungles on tropical shores. Observe jaguars prowling a Costa Rican beach and encounter the largest sharks.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The lives of monkeys, chimps, orangutans and apes at Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The lives of monkeys, chimps, orangutans and apes at Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre.

programme.title: My Best Friends An Animal
programme.desc: Exploring the stories behind remarkable friendships that have formed between humans and some of the most unlikely animal companions, from a bull that plays football to a mouse family living in an English garden.

programme.title: A Wild Year On Earth
programme.desc: Rain welcomes baby meerkats to the Kalahari. The arrival spring in eastern Australia ignites the passions everything from kangaroos to humpback whales.

programme.title: Malawi Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: Witness a busy day as the team releases rehabilitated pythons, teaches a pangolin how to hunt, and rounds up a troop of vervet monkeys.

programme.title: Ol Pejeta Diaries
programme.desc: A once-in-a-generation drought has sucked all the moisture from surrounding rivers and the Conservation team is struggling to keep up with the swath of thirsty creatures.

programme.title: Ol Pejeta Diaries
programme.desc: Eco-tourism isnt just a background player in the operation of Ol Pej, its the financial backbone that keeps the park operating. From comfortable camping to ulta-luxurious accommodations, the guests that stay at Ol Pejeta live among nature.

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: In October, the team branch out into market gardening, all-year-round egg production and beef cattle. They begin training the shire horses for a year of work in the fields. They take on a pair of goats who prove to be more than a handful at milking time, and Ruth preserves supplies for the winter. Peter visits a cooper and learns how to make a barrel, and Alex launches a chicken enterprise.

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Antiques auctioneer Catherine Southon, wheeler dealer Tony Wong and upholsterer extraordinaire Micaela Sharp head to Faversham to find some bargains they can turn into some flipping profit. programme.desc: Its November and to prosper as Edwardian farmers, Alex, Peter and Ruth must get to grips with the technologies of the age. programme.title: My Greek Kitchen
programme.desc: On the island of Naxos, famous for its beaches and excellent local cuisine, Tonia picks vine leaves, a staple of the famous Greek dish, dolmades.

programme.title: My Greek Kitchen

programme.desc: Without doubt, a huge influence over modern British cuisine are the flavours of the Mediterranean. Brought at first by the Romans and more recently by hordes of holidaymakers returning from the sun, the range of dishes and ingredients we have adopted from the Med are now commonplace on our menus and in our homes. Dave Myers and Si King look at how this has evolved and create their favourite dishes.

programme.title: Rick Steins Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: Rick Stein takes the viewer on an epic culinary journey by sea, down rivers and overland to explore the Far Easts diverse food cultures. He begins his odyssey in Cambodia, where he discovers the joys of freshly caught swimmer crabs cooked with green peppercorns from Kampot, once the king of pepper. He learns how to cook the famous Fish Amok, made with lemongrass and coconut and he samples Lok Lak.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Theres a surprise waiting for Derek in Hull - a MGSA sports car that once had a tree growing through it. Plus, in North Wales, Alan Holmes is selling his sons Ford Escort RS 1600i.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up a rare Ford Zodiac Farnham Estate, while Dave heads for an isolated tent in the Midlands to collect a Triumph Toledo.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek collects a Ford Thames 400E that once belonged to the pop band Edison Lighthouse. Plus, Dave heads to York to collect an Astra GTE convertible.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team enlist the help of the local community in Durham to reconfigure a home and reunite a family torn apart by illness. Sixteen-year-old Kieron Purvis collapsed with an undiagnosed heart condition in December 2009. Following a heart transplant and a double amputation, the Purvis family found themselves living apart because their home was not equipped for Kierons special needs.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team are joined by designer Charlie Luxton. They enlist the help of the local community in Stoke and renovate a home for a family battling terminal illness. Dad Haydn Spice was diagnosed with abdominal cancer shortly after buying a derelict house at auction in 2004. Haydns ill health meant that he couldnt work on the house, and his family have been left living in a building site.

programme.desc: A bull terrier puppy needs a 3D printed implant for a new lease of life. Meanwhile, a Siamese cat has multiple injuries after being hit by a van and a beloved collie cross needs a new hip.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Following the `Bionic Vet, Noel Fitzpatrick, and his team as they use their pioneering techniques to attempt to cure pets across the country that might otherwise be beyond saving.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team enlist the help of the local community in Aberystwyth to renovate a home for a builder with a brain tumour. Michael Saunders built an extension onto his house when his son- in-laws MS meant he had to start using a wheelchair. When Michael discovered he had cancer, he was unable to finish his own home and he and his partner were left living in a cold and draughty shell of a house.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team enlist the help of the local community in Durham to reconfigure a home and reunite a family torn apart by illness. Sixteen-year-old Kieron Purvis collapsed with an undiagnosed heart condition in December 2009. Following a heart transplant and a double amputation, the Purvis family found themselves living apart because their home was not equipped for Kierons special needs.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes of HART, the Yorkshire Ambulance Services Hazardous Area Response Team, one of 15 specialist medical units set up after the 7/7 London bombings to treat badly injured patients in extreme environments.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Behind Bars
programme.desc: Louis Theroux travels to California to spend two weeks in the notorious San Quentin State Prison. Built in 1852, San Quentin is dangerously overcrowded. Louis discovers the prisoners inner culture, intrigued by its rules and language. He meets David Silva, who is serving 521 years and 11 life sentences and is locked down for 23 hours a day, and Deborah and Rob, a transgender couple who live together inside.

programme.title: Psychopath with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: In this groundbreaking and new documentary format, Piers Morgan ventures behind bars for an encounter with diagnosed psychopath Paris Bennett, a man who is more intelligent, more cunning and more manipulative than any criminal Piers has met before.

programme.title: Nurses Down Under
programme.desc: Witness medical dramas through the eyes of the nurses, many from the UK, who work in three of Sydneys busiest hospitals.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Law and Disorder in Johannesburg
programme.desc: Louis Theroux travels to Johannesburg, where the residents find themselves increasingly besieged by crime. Despairing of the capability of the police and the courts to protect them, many have turned to an industry of private security offering protection for a price. Are the sometimes brutal methods of these private police really a solution or just another part of the problem?

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Life on the Edge
Back From the Dead: Who Kidnapped Me?
programme.desc: Delimar Vera wants to know who helped kidnap her as a baby, and a search for answers leads to an emotional reunion, new revelations and a confrontation with her father.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A French bulldog has an exploded disc and faces a high-risk operation. A cat called called Nutty has a shattered radius after being shot with an airgun.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Gentle giant Bear, an English mastiff, visits Noel after suffering a painful ruptured cruciate ligament in his knee. Siamese cat Bluebell is rushed in after being hit by a car. Alongside a fractured pelvis, Noel suspects possible nerve damage.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team enlist local tradespeople, members of the community and guest designer Charlie Luxton in Cirencester to transform an incomplete extension and run-down house into a clean, warm and healthy home for a family on the brink of despair. The Beasley family re-mortgaged their ex-council house in 2006 to pay for an extension.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the SOS team enlist the help of the local community to finish converting a two-bedroom bungalow into a four-bedroom home for a family at the end of their tether. The trades from Ottery St Mary in Devon turn out in force to help the Wright family, who have suffered years of illness and bad luck.

programme.title: Honest Renovations
programme.desc: Koey has a never-ending to-do list, managing a full-time job alongside a successful side hustle while raising her kids; so, when her sister generously gifts her their shared home, Koey struggles to find time for the renovations to make it her own.

programme.title: Katie Piper: Locked Up in Louisiana
programme.desc: Katie meets Whitley, who was convicted of killing her brother after an argument. Whitley claims it was self-defence, but Katie learns she left the house and came back with a gun.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Miami Mega Jail
programme.desc: Louis spends time in the fifth and sixth floors of Miami County Jail, where many of the most volatile inmates are incarcerated; one of the most notorious sections of the prison. The inmates have developed a strange and violent jail culture and live under the sway of a gladiatorial code. Housed in large cage-like dwellings that hold up to 24 men, they remain in the cells almost all the time.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Miami Mega Jail
programme.desc: Louis Theroux goes deeper into the jail system, meeting an alleged triple murderer facing a possible death sentence. He also follows a group of forty or so younger inmates who have escaped prison by pleading guilty and agreeing to attend a four month military style boot camp.

programme.title: Stacey Dooley
programme.desc: Stacey travels to America to meet people prepping for an uncertain future, all with different concerns - from climate change and natural disasters to civil unrest.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Dan and Shane suspect blood poisoning after picking up a seriously ill patient.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Talking to Anorexia
programme.desc: Louis Theroux spends time in two of Londons biggest adult eating-disorder treatment facilities. He meets women of all ages and at various stages of their illness, and witnesses the power anorexia holds over them.

programme.desc: Contestants play a large coin-drop machine, provided they answer questions correctly. Answer incorrectly and the players could be eliminated. The last contestant standing has an opportunity to win the machines £10,000 jackpot.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien are in the West Midlands and London, with finds including a potato oven and an old petrol pump.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team enlist the help of the local community in Durham to reconfigure a home and reunite a family torn apart by illness. Sixteen-year-old Kieron Purvis collapsed with an undiagnosed heart condition in December 2009. Following a heart transplant and a double amputation, the Purvis family found themselves living apart because their home was not equipped for Kierons special needs.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team are joined by designer Charlie Luxton. They enlist the help of the local community in Stoke and renovate a home for a family battling terminal illness. Dad Haydn Spice was diagnosed with abdominal cancer shortly after buying a derelict house at auction in 2004. Haydns ill health meant that he couldnt work on the house, and his family have been left living in a building site.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Contestants play a large coin-drop machine, provided they answer questions correctly. Answer incorrectly and the players could be eliminated. The last contestant standing has an opportunity to win the machines £10,000 jackpot.

programme.title: Tipping Point

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Contestants play a large coin-drop machine, provided they answer questions correctly. Answer incorrectly and the players could be eliminated. The last contestant standing has an opportunity to win the machines £10,000 jackpot.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A bull terrier puppy needs a 3D printed implant for a new lease of life. Meanwhile, a Siamese cat has multiple injuries after being hit by a van and a beloved collie cross needs a new hip.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Following the `Bionic Vet, Noel Fitzpatrick, and his team as they use their pioneering techniques to attempt to cure pets across the country that might otherwise be beyond saving.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team enlist the help of the local community in Aberystwyth to renovate a home for a builder with a brain tumour. Michael Saunders built an extension onto his house when his son- in-laws MS meant he had to start using a wheelchair. When Michael discovered he had cancer, he was unable to finish his own home and he and his partner were left living in a cold and draughty shell of a house.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team enlist the help of the local community in Durham to reconfigure a home and reunite a family torn apart by illness. Sixteen-year-old Kieron Purvis collapsed with an undiagnosed heart condition in December 2009. Following a heart transplant and a double amputation, the Purvis family found themselves living apart because their home was not equipped for Kierons special needs.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes of HART, the Yorkshire Ambulance Services Hazardous Area Response Team, one of 15 specialist medical units set up after the 7/7 London bombings to treat badly injured patients in extreme environments.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Behind Bars
programme.desc: Louis Theroux travels to California to spend two weeks in the notorious San Quentin State Prison. Built in 1852, San Quentin is dangerously overcrowded. Louis discovers the prisoners inner culture, intrigued by its rules and language. He meets David Silva, who is serving 521 years and 11 life sentences and is locked down for 23 hours a day, and Deborah and Rob, a transgender couple who live together inside.

programme.title: Psychopath with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: In this groundbreaking and new documentary format, Piers Morgan ventures behind bars for an encounter with diagnosed psychopath Paris Bennett, a man who is more intelligent, more cunning and more manipulative than any criminal Piers has met before.

programme.title: Nurses Down Under
programme.desc: Witness medical dramas through the eyes of the nurses, many from the UK, who work in three of Sydneys busiest hospitals.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Law and Disorder in Johannesburg
programme.desc: Louis Theroux travels to Johannesburg, where the residents find themselves increasingly besieged by crime. Despairing of the capability of the police and the courts to protect them, many have turned to an industry of private security offering protection for a price. Are the sometimes brutal methods of these private police really a solution or just another part of the problem?

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Life on the Edge
Back From the Dead: Who Kidnapped Me?
programme.desc: Delimar Vera wants to know who helped kidnap her as a baby, and a search for answers leads to an emotional reunion, new revelations and a confrontation with her father.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team enlist local tradespeople, members of the community and guest designer Charlie Luxton in Cirencester to transform an incomplete extension and run-down house into a clean, warm and healthy home for a family on the brink of despair. The Beasley family re-mortgaged their ex-council house in 2006 to pay for an extension.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the SOS team enlist the help of the local community to finish converting a two-bedroom bungalow into a four-bedroom home for a family at the end of their tether. The trades from Ottery St Mary in Devon turn out in force to help the Wright family, who have suffered years of illness and bad luck.

programme.title: Honest Renovations
programme.desc: Koey has a never-ending to-do list, managing a full-time job alongside a successful side hustle while raising her kids; so, when her sister generously gifts her their shared home, Koey struggles to find time for the renovations to make it her own.

programme.title: Katie Piper: Locked Up in Louisiana
programme.desc: Katie meets Whitley, who was convicted of killing her brother after an argument. Whitley claims it was self-defence, but Katie learns she left the house and came back with a gun.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Miami Mega Jail
programme.desc: Louis spends time in the fifth and sixth floors of Miami County Jail, where many of the most volatile inmates are incarcerated; one of the most notorious sections of the prison. The inmates have developed a strange and violent jail culture and live under the sway of a gladiatorial code. Housed in large cage-like dwellings that hold up to 24 men, they remain in the cells almost all the time.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Miami Mega Jail
programme.desc: Louis Theroux goes deeper into the jail system, meeting an alleged triple murderer facing a possible death sentence. He also follows a group of forty or so younger inmates who have escaped prison by pleading guilty and agreeing to attend a four month military style boot camp.

programme.title: Stacey Dooley
programme.desc: Stacey travels to America to meet people prepping for an uncertain future, all with different concerns - from climate change and natural disasters to civil unrest.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Dan and Shane suspect blood poisoning after picking up a seriously ill patient.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Talking to Anorexia
programme.desc: Louis Theroux spends time in two of Londons biggest adult eating-disorder treatment facilities. He meets women of all ages and at various stages of their illness, and witnesses the power anorexia holds over them.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo reaches the most westerly station in Wales, Milford Haven, the biggest energy port in the United Kingdom. He then heads north, visiting Britains smallest city and its cathedral.

programme.sub-title: North West and Isle of Man: Part 1

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team is in Yorkshire at the glorious Piece Hall in Halifax, the only surviving 18th-century cloth hall where textiles were once traded. Treasures include a Chinese imperial robe, an opal pig and a stunning sapphire brooch.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
